achievements: SQLite backend replaces electron-store: delta write (writeDeltaTx), in-memory cache, legacy todoist-clone.json import on first run — 25/25 tests green
O(n²)→Set in persist.ts, UUID IPC validation, snapshot cache, delta guards in collections — storage perf hardened
All 23 loose components reorganized into domain subfolders (task-panel, task-list, modals, project, layout, etc.) with index.tsx barrels + named exports
Health/Meds PK page shipped: asymmetric smoothing, MEC/MTC therapeutic window, crash-risk detection, Recharts chart
Kanban DnD fixed: cross-column drag preview via live draft state in onDragOver, frozen card size via source rect
11 themes added (Dracula, Gruvbox, Catppuccin, Tokyo Night, Kanagawa, etc.) + hardcoded zinc/white tokens replaced with app-* CSS vars across all views
Shared types/defaults extracted to src/shared/ — single source across main, preload, renderer
Panels (TaskEdit, TaskCreate, ProjectPanel) redesigned from right-side slide to centered modal cards
improvements: useAppStore.ts (~7k tok) — candidate for slice split; domain actions mixed with UI actions and PK settings in one file
persist.ts PERSISTED_KEYS and stateFromPersisted — verify these stay in sync with shared/types.ts after each new field; currently manual
SessionsCalendar.tsx (~5k tok) — high-complexity component; extract DraftGhost logic and time-block layout into smaller hooks
HealthPage.tsx (~5.3k tok) — SliderRow + chart data generation inline; extract pharmacokinetics controls to sub-component
supabase/schema.sql present but Supabase sync code still lives in renderer store — if sync is being kept, move push logic to main process to avoid IPC backpressure
next_tasks: Run bun run typecheck + bun run lint — confirm dev branch is clean after the 2026-04-23 SQLite sessions
Merge dev → main (last main commit was 2d2defc perf/storage); current dev has significant unreleased work
Persist new fields introduced this week (pkSettings, healthEntries) through the full save path: shared/types.ts → appState.ts → sqlite.ts schema → persist.ts
Add SQLite schema migration path — currently a fresh DB or legacy import; no version column means future field additions are fragile
Test HealthPage with real data: add a med entry, reload app, verify persistence round-trip through SQLite
Keyboard shortcuts: 'h' for Health page not yet wired in useKeyboardShortcuts.ts
risks: PERSISTED_KEYS in persist.ts and APP_STATE_KEYS in appState.ts must stay manually synchronized — no compile-time enforcement; a missed key silently drops data on save
better-sqlite3 must be rebuilt for Electron runtime; CI or a fresh bun install will break if rebuild step is missing from package.json scripts
No SQLite schema version/migration table — adding a column in the future requires manual ALTER TABLE or a full drop+recreate path
Supabase sync (SyncSection, schema.sql) is partially implemented but removed from main flow per 2026-04-19 refactor; dead code risk if not cleaned up or re-integrated intentionally
